scenarios.name: Paginated CRUD router with validation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses APIRouter with prefix/tags, Pydantic Field(gt=0) for price, Query(ge=0/le=100) for pagination bounds, and status.HTTP_201_CREATED; baseline relies on a flat FastAPI app, no Field/Query constraints, and missing 201 status.

scenarios.name: Auth-protected route with async DB dependency
scenarios.rationale: Treatment matches the skill's exact pattern (Header(...) + removeprefix('Bearer '), async with async_session() yielding AsyncSession, both Depends in route); baseline uses HTTPBearer/Security and a try/finally session instead of async with.
